name: Pixel Smash Ball
description: Smash your way through colorful pixel blocks in Pixel Smash Ball! Bounce the ball, aim carefully, and destroy every pixel on the screen. Test your reflexes and precision as the challenge grows with each level. Fun, addictive, and perfect for players of all ages, this arcade-style game keeps you hooked with vibrant graphics and exciting gameplay. Can you clear every pixel and become the ultimate smash master? Play now and start smashing!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
